deploy.startCommand: echo '[start] waiting for db'; php /var/www/html/docker/wait-for-db.php; echo '[start] optimize'; php artisan optimize; echo '[start] migrate'; php artisan migrate --force 2>&1 || echo '[start] migrate failed'; echo '[start] storage:link'; php artisan storage:link --force 2>/dev/null; echo '[start] supervisord'; exec /usr/bin/supervisord -c /etc/supervisord.conf
